title: Speedrunners highlight (Bastion gold block)
description: Highlights gold blocks designed for bastion.
body:
Speedrunners highlight (Bastion gold block) assists speedrunners to help them see gold blocks from far away. This can massively assist time in speedruns for people who do not memorize the gold blocks.

If there is a version that does not exist please email me here so i know to add it:
zwhseton@gmail.com
